name: @girardelli/cto-toolkit
description: 54+ engineering skills for Claude Code — architecture review, security, DevOps, database, API design, and more. Now with declarative skill activation, model routing, and continuous learning.

features.declarative-activation: Skills declare triggers in frontmatter (frameworks, anti-patterns, score thresholds, file patterns, domains)
features.model-routing: Skills and agents declare preferred model tier (haiku/sonnet/opus) with dynamic escalation
features.continuous-learning: Session patterns recorded for improvement suggestions over time
features.dependency-graph: Skills declare dependencies for optimal execution ordering
